arabic: حَدَّثَنِي مُوسَى بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ، حَدَّثَنَا جُوَيْرِيَةُ، عَنْ نَافِعٍ، أَنَّ بَعْضَ بَنِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، قَالَ لَهُ لَوْ أَقَمْتَ‏.‏ بِهَذَا‏.‏

english.text:
Some of the sons of `Abdullah told him (i.e. `Abdullah) if he had stayed (and not performed Hajj that 
year).

chapter.english: Pilgrims Prevented from Completing the Pilgrimage
